forms.messageHelper: Share enough detail for the team to reply clearly. You do not need to include anything you are not comfortable sending by email.
forms.updatesOptInLabel: I would like occasional updates about future sessions and events.
forms.noscriptNote: JavaScript is off, so this page will reload with a confirmation message after you send the form.
forms.invalidStatusMessage: Check the highlighted fields before sending your message.

cookieEntryPoint.title: Cookie choices
cookieEntryPoint.whenNoBanner: This site does not show a cookie banner at launch. The Cookie Notice explains the live first-party aggregate analytics model, the objection control on that route, and the storage that stays absent.
cookieEntryPoint.whenBannerPresent: Cookie choices are managed through the current consent controls and explained in the Cookie Notice.

accessibilityFeedback.title: Need help using the site?
accessibilityFeedback.body: Use the dedicated accessibility feedback form if something on the site is difficult to use or if you need information in another format.

calendarDownload.title: Calendar download
calendarDownload.availableBody: Calendar files download as .ics and then open in your own calendar app, which has its own accessibility and privacy settings.
calendarDownload.unavailableBody: Calendar download is not available right now. Use the session page or contact route if you need the next date confirmed.

socialExternalLink.title: External platform
socialExternalLink.body: Instagram is outside the main website and has its own accessibility, privacy, and account settings.

mapExternalLink.title: Directions link
mapExternalLink.body: Directions links open an external map service with its own accessibility and privacy settings.
